candidate.name: pure_cublas_three_sgemm_3sgemm_style
candidate.strategy: Replaces ATen matmul/add and explicit B.T materialization with three direct cuBLAS SGEMMs, uses a compact {d,16} U temporary, and accumulates the rank-16 update into Y via beta=1 to reduce framework overhead and extra launches while preserving cuBLAS for the dominant full GEMM.
